recommendations.title: The 6th Man
recommendations.overview: A college athlete returns from the dead to help his brother's basketball team win the NCAA title.

recommendations.title: CBGB
recommendations.overview: A look at New York's dynamic punk rock scene through the lens of the ground-breaking Lower East Side club started by eccentric Hilly Kristal in 1973 which launched thousands of bands.

recommendations.title: Bottle Shock

recommendations.title: Class Act

recommendations.title: Throw Momma from the Train
recommendations.overview: Larry Donner, an author with a cruel ex-wife, teaches a writing workshop in which one of his students, Owen, is fed up with his domineering mother. When Owen watches a Hitchcock classic that seems to mirror his own life, he decides to put the movie's

recommendations.title: If I Were a Rich Man
recommendations.overview: A man which wife is filing to divorce him wins 25 million EUR in the lotto, hiding her to prevent sharing the half of the prize.

recommendations.title: Rain Man
recommendations.overview: When car dealer Charlie Babbitt learns that his estranged father has died, he returns home to Cincinnati, where he discovers that he has a savant older brother named Raymond and that his father's $3 million fortune is being left to the mental institu

recommendations.title: The Guilty
recommendations.overview: Police officer Asger Holm, demoted to desk work as an alarm dispatcher, answers a call from a panicked woman who claims to have been kidnapped. Confined to the police station and with the phone as his only tool, Asger races against time to get help a

recommendations.title: Hoffa
recommendations.overview: A portrait of union leader James R. Hoffa, as seen through the eyes of his friend, Bobby Ciaro. The film follows Hoffa through his countless battles with the RTA and President Roosevelt.

recommendations.title: Nebraska
recommendations.overview: An aging, booze-addled father takes a trip from Montana to Nebraska with his estranged son in order to claim what he believes to be a million-dollar sweepstakes prize.
